title: TOYO Selected for NEDO Project, Advancing SAF with VelocysГўв‚¬в„ў FT Technology and TOYOГўв‚¬в„ўs Methanol Process
content: Toyo Engineering Corp. has been selected by the New Energy and Industrial Technology Development Organization (NEDO) for its initiative, Гўв‚¬Е“Development of Production Technologies for Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF), etc.Гўв‚¬Вќ. TOYOГўв‚¬в„ўs proposal, Гўв‚¬Е“Feasibility Study on SAF via Gasification FT Synthesis Using Expanded Feedstocks and eSAF ProductionГўв‚¬Вќ, was adopted under the category Гўв‚¬Е“Development of SAF Production Technologies Utilizing Diverse Feedstocks.Гўв‚¬Вќ With global air traffic projected to rise and the urgent need to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions, demand for SAF is expected to grow rapidly in the coming years. This project will evaluate the technical and economic feasibility of producing SAF from a wide range of feedstocksГўв‚¬вЂќincluding municipal solid wasteГўв‚¬вЂќvia two distinct pathways: 1) gasification Fischer-Tropsch (FT) synthesis and 2) methanol synthesis and conversion to SAF.
author: Analysts Account
